title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event (June 2025)
text: Campus tour 29 June | August 2025 intake | SOLD OUT Event Status: Completed Date & Time: June 29, 2025 11:00 AM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Book now Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: This entry details a completed campus tour event for the August 2025 intake at University of Southampton Delhi, held on June 29, 2025, at International Tech Park Gurgaon.
